chunk:
## Knee Malalignment Taping Technique

The two techniques demonstrated below are potentially very simple in one respect because only one piece of tape is required. I do find in practice that sometimes the simple approach can work very well. Just remember that the majority of knee pain is merely a symptom, and the causative factor for the patient’s pain might be in another structure, such as the hip joint, or possibly over-pronation of the foot.

The application of a single piece of tape can be done on its own with a 2-inch small “I” strip. The technique can also be applied in combination with the full knee taping, as described below. Another option is to use the 4-inch (Big Daddy) piece of tape, as shown in Figure 3.9, in the alternative technique below.
